comment.body:
There were multiple 100 - 200 points pullbacks since that Alma predicted accurately. And she indeed said cautious long on April bottom. She was too cautious maybe until move was confirmed but she accurately predicted both the crash and the bottom.
Now she doesn’t predict crash, or fall. She says what everyone else says: this move is instable. No retest no structure, just agressive bid. Like market is desperately going up to hideg the slowing growth and forthcoming inflation pressures. 
She just says to get hedges cuz the likelihood is big, but short only if downside move is confirmed. There was no downside move confirmed since July. If you missed this whole run up in the past 5 months that definitely not anyone's fault but yours. Sry
This whole run up is pumped on Fed cut. Market is waiting for Fed cut. And alma warned that even after it happens Trump may come up with deals, that will pump back the market to prevent a 10% pullback.
